label: 5762 Criminal penalties

children.heading: Engaging in business unlawfully
children.label: 1 Engaging in business unlawfully
children.text: Engages in business as a manufacturer or importer of tobacco products or cigarette papers and tubes, or as an export warehouse proprietor, without filing the bond and obtaining the permit where required by this chapter or regulations thereunder; or

children.heading: Failing to furnish information or furnishing false information
children.label: 2 Failing to furnish information or furnishing false information
children.text: Fails to keep or make any record, return, report, or inventory, or keeps or makes any false or fraudulent record, return, report, or inventory, required by this chapter or regulations thereunder; or

children.heading: Refusing to pay or evading tax
children.label: 3 Refusing to pay or evading tax
children.text: Refuses to pay any tax imposed by this chapter, or attempts in any manner to evade or defeat the tax or the payment thereof; or

children.heading: Removing tobacco products or cigarette papers or tubes unlawfully
children.label: 4 Removing tobacco products or cigarette papers or tubes unlawfully
children.text: Removes, contrary to this chapter or regulations thereunder, any tobacco products or cigarette papers or tubes subject to tax under this chapter; or

children.heading: Purchasing, receiving, possessing, or selling tobacco products or cigarette papers or tubes unlawfully
children.label: 5 Purchasing, receiving, possessing, or selling tobacco products or cigarette papers or tubes unlawfully
children.text: Violates any provision of section 5751(a)(1) or (a)(2); or

children.heading: Destroying, obliterating, or detaching marks, labels, or notices before packages are emptied
children.label: 6 Destroying, obliterating, or detaching marks, labels, or notices before packages are emptied

children.heading: Other offenses
children.label: b Other offenses
children.text: Whoever, otherwise than as provided in subsection (a), violates any provision of this chapter, or of regulations prescribed thereunder, shall, for each such offense, be fined not more than $1,000, or imprisoned not more than 1 year, or both.
